g.text: 🍜 Hệ Thống Quản Lý Quán Bánh Cuốn — Documentation Structure Map (QR Ordering + POS + Kitchen Display)
CLAUDE.md — PROJECT ENTRY POINT (read first at every session)
Session start: 1) Read CLAUDE.md → check Current Work section 2) Open TASKS.md → find next ⬜ task with all deps ✅ 3) Follow IMPLEMENTATION_WORKFLOW.md → 7 steps
Prefix system: 💡 SUGGESTION · ⚠️ FLAG · 🚨 RISK · 🔴 STOP · ❓ CLARIFY · 🔄 REDIRECT Stack: Go 1.25 + Gin + sqlc + MySQL + Redis | Next.js 14 + TS strict + Tailwind + Zustand + TanStack Query
Current Work section → what's done, what's next
Find next ⬜ task (all deps must be ✅)
⬜ not started · 🔄 in progress · ✅ done · 🔴 blocked
READ → PLAN → ALIGN → IMPLEMENT → SELF-REVIEW → TEST → DONE
TẦNG 1 — CORE NAVIGATION (Always read — these 3 files guide every session)
Rule: TASKS.md wins when it conflicts with CLAUDE.md
Step 1: READ — spec + system guide + contracts
Step 2: PLAN — list subtasks, identify risks
Step 3: ALIGN — confirm plan with user before coding
Step 4: IMPLEMENT — write code following patterns
Step 5: SELF-REVIEW — check AC, errors, patterns
Step 6: TEST — run tests, start dev server, verify UI
Step 7: DONE — update TASKS.md status to ✅
FE Pre-Task (Step 0): Step 0a READ SPEC → 0b DRAW wireframe → 0c DECOMPOSE → 0d WRITE task rows
Rule: FE tasks MUST have spec_ref + draw_ref before starting
⚠️ FLAG — something to watch, not blocking
🚨 RISK — high-risk action, explain before proceed
🔴 STOP — do not continue without confirmation
Also stores: session patterns, lessons from past failures
TẦNG 2 — SHARED FACTS (Cross-cutting rules — read when needed, used by BE + FE + DevOps)
Never guess field names — read this
Full API spec in OpenAPI format
TẦNG 3 — SYSTEM GUIDES (PRIMARY guides — read before coding any domain — these are your coding bible)
8 Epics: Auth · Products · Tables · Orders · Payments · KDS · QR · Staff
▸ Strict layers: Handler → Service → Repository → DB (sqlc)
Primary to read for: CLAUDE_BE.md + Spec for that domain
8 Epics: Auth · Menu · Cart/Checkout · KDS · POS · Admin · Staff · Marketing
▸ Server state: TanStack Query v5 (useQuery / useMutation)
▸ Client state: Zustand v4 (stores per domain)
▸ Forms: React Hook Form + Zod validation
▸ TypeScript strict — no any, no ts-ignore
▸ Next.js 14 App Router — server components default
FE task format: spec_ref + draw_ref REQUIRED
Infra: Docker Compose · Caddy reverse proxy · GitHub Actions
▸ docker compose up -d --build be|fe (after code change)
TẦNG 3 — DOMAIN SPECS (Read only when working on that domain — each spec covers 1 feature area)
TẦNG 3 — CLAUDE ROLE GUIDES (Domain-specific coding instructions for Claude per role)
Anti-patterns to avoid · Per-domain code examples
Complements BE_SYSTEM_GUIDE.md when writing BE code
Component rules · State management · Form patterns
Complements FE_SYSTEM_GUIDE.md when writing FE code
Docker config rules · Caddy setup · CI/CD pipeline
Business Analyst · DB schema guide · System-level guide · Team practices
CLAUDE_LEAD.md (tech lead view) · CLAUDE_CASESTUDY.md (case study prompts)
SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION (Context — read when researching background or process)

COLOR KEY: 🟠 Orange = Entry / Session protocol | 🔵 Blue = Tầng 1 Core navigation (always read) | 🟣 Purple = Tầng 2 Shared facts (cross-cutting) | 🟢 Green = Tầng 3 System guides (primary) | 🔷 Indigo = Tầng 3 Domain specs | 🩵 Cyan = Claude role guides | 🟡 Yellow = Process / Qui trinh | 🌿 Light green = Onboarding | 🌸 Pink = PM docs | 🟠 Light orange = Task details | 🩵 Sky = Wireframes + Case studies

DOC HIERARCHY: CLAUDE.md (entry) → Session protocol (3 steps) → TẦNG 1 (always read: TASKS + WORKFLOW + LESSONS) → TẦNG 2 (shared facts when needed) → TẦNG 3 (system guides PRIMARY + domain specs + role guides) → Supporting docs

READING ORDER for a new task: CLAUDE.md → TASKS.md (find task) → WORKFLOW.md (step 1 = READ) → BE/FE_SYSTEM_GUIDE → domain Spec → ERROR_CONTRACT + API_CONTRACT + DB_SCHEMA → MASTER §3-6 → CLAUDE_BE/FE → CODE
